headline: AI and bots have officially taken over the internet, report finds
summary: HUMAN Security's State of AI Traffic report found that bots have eclipsed human users, with automated traffic growing eight times faster than human activity.

raw.headline: AI and bots have officially taken over the internet, report finds

headline: How The Palo Alto Networks (PANW) Investment Story Is Shifting With AI And Growth Questions
summary: Palo Alto Networks’ fair value price target has shifted slightly from US$208.16 to US$207.75. This is a modest adjustment that keeps the focus on what is driving sentiment rather than on a big reset in expectations. Analysts are splitting between those who point to questions around growth, integration and AI execution, and those who see demand for broader cybersecurity platforms and recent quarters as supportive for the current setup. As you read on, you will see how these mixed signals shape...
